basic_details.organization_name: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), Aircraft Division, Nasik (A Maharatna CPSE)
basic_details.job_location: Industrial Health Center, HAL, Ojhar Township, Nashik – 422 207
basic_details.short_information: HAL Aircraft Division, Nasik is engaging 02 Physiotherapists on a visiting basis at the Industrial Health Center, Ojhar Township, Nashik.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates via Email

qualification.details: criteria: Details | upper age limit: 40 years as on 01-06-2026 (date of advertisement); No further relaxation is admissible | valid email id: Mandatory - interview intimation will be sent only via email
qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) or Master in Physiotherapy (MPT) from a recognized institution; qualification must be recognized by the Occupational Therapy and Physiotherapy Council

vacancy_details.Qualification: Bachelor in Physiotherapy / Master in Physiotherapy from a recognized institution

salary_details.details: Applicants are required to clearly indicate their expected remuneration per visit (considering a minimum of 03 visits per week) in the application form. The remuneration per visit will be fixed by HAL. In addition, as per the applicable rules of HAL at the time of engagement, selected candidates will also be eligible for conveyance reimbursement per visit. No other allowances or benefits will be provided beyond what is indicated above.

selection_process: Stage 1 - Shortlisting: Suitable candidates from among the applicants will be shortlisted for the interview based on the qualifications
and completeness of the application as per the prescribed format.
Stage 2 - Personal Interview: Shortlisted candidates will be called for a personal interview conducted at HAL Hospital

Nashik. The exact date and timing of the interview will be intimated to shortlisted candidates through their registered email ID. HAL will not be responsible for bouncing of any email sent to candidates.
Final Selection: Final selection will be made based solely on the candidate's performance in the personal interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply offline only using the prescribed application format (Annexure-I). No application/resume will be accepted by email.
Download the application form (Annexure-I) from the HAL official website: www.hal-india.co.in
Fill in the application form completely and correctly in the prescribed format. Indicate the expected remuneration per visit clearly in the application.

Attach self-attested photocopies of all relevant certificates and documents as proof of: Age Educational Qualification (BPT/MPT degree certificate and marksheets) Registration with Occupational Therapy and Physiotherapy Council Post-qualification Experience (minimum 1 year) Any relevant training certificates
Educational Qualification (BPT/MPT degree certificate and marksheets)
Registration with Occupational Therapy and Physiotherapy Council
Sign the application form (unsigned applications will not be considered).
Send/submit the complete application by Post / Courier / By Hand so as to reach on or before 08-06-2026 to:
Age proof (Birth Certificate / SSLC / School Leaving Certificate)
BPT / MPT degree certificate and marksheets from a recognized institution
Registration certificate from Occupational Therapy and Physiotherapy Council
Experience certificate(s) proving minimum 1 year post-qualification experience
Any training certificates relevant to physiotherapy

faq.question: Q1. How many Physiotherapist posts are available in HAL Nasik Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), Aircraft Division, Nasik has announced 02 Physiotherapist posts on a visiting basis at the Industrial Health Center, HAL, Ojhar Township, Nashik, under Notification No. NK/1209(6)/(Physiotherapist)/2026/02 dated 01-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for HAL Nasik Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the filled application form (by Post/Courier/By Hand) is 08-06-2026. Applications must physically reach the Manager (Human Resources), HAL Aircraft Division, Ojhar Township, NASHIK – 422 207 on or before this date. HAL does not take responsibility for postal delays.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for HAL Nasik Physiotherapist post 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) or Master in Physiotherapy (MPT) from a recognized institution. The qualification must be recognized by the Occupational Therapy and Physiotherapy Council. Only regular/full-time qualifications are eligible — part-time, correspondence, distance education, or e-learning qualifications are NOT accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for HAL Nasik Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 40 years as on 01-06-2026 (date of advertisement). No further age relaxation of any kind is admissible for this post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the remuneration for HAL Nasik Physiotherapist (Visiting Basis) 2026?
faq.answer: The remuneration per visit will be fixed by HAL. Applicants must indicate their expected remuneration per visit (for a minimum of 03 visits per week) in the application form. In addition, selected candidates are eligible for conveyance reimbursement per visit as per applicable HAL rules. No other allowances or benefits are provided.

faq.question: Q6. How many visits per week are required for the HAL Nasik Physiotherapist post?
faq.answer: The selected Physiotherapist must visit 3 times per week for a minimum of 4 hours per visit at the Industrial Health Center, HAL, Ojhar Township, Nashik, to carry out routine physiotherapy activities including SWD, Microwave, TENS, ILT, ICT, Infra Red, IFT, Wax Bath, CPM, Ultrasound, Electrical Stimulator, and exercises for indoor and outdoor patients.

faq.question: Q7. What is the period of engagement for HAL Nasik Physiotherapist 2026?
faq.answer: The engagement is initially for 2 years, extendable by a further 2 years based on the requirement of the Hospital and the performance of the Specialist as assessed by the Head of the Hospital. This is a temporary/visiting basis engagement only — it does not confer any right to claim regular employee status at HAL.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for HAL Nasik Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of two stages: (1) Shortlisting of suitable candidates based on application review; and (2) Personal Interview conducted at HAL Hospital, Ojhar Township, Nashik. Interview date and timing will be intimated to shortlisted candidates via email. Final selection is based solely on performance in the personal interview.

faq.question: Q9. How to apply for HAL Nasik Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must download the prescribed application form (Annexure-I) from www.hal-india.co.in, fill it completely (including expected remuneration per visit), attach self-attested photocopies of all relevant certificates (age proof, qualification, experience, council registration), and submit by Post/Courier/By Hand to reach The Manager (Human Resources), HAL Aircraft Division, Ojhar Township PO, Tal Niphad, NASHIK – 422 207, on or before 08-06-2026. Email applications are NOT accepted.

faq.question: Q10. Is the HAL Nasik Physiotherapist 2026 post a permanent/regular government job?
faq.answer: No. The HAL Nasik Physiotherapist post is strictly on a temporary, visiting basis only. It does not confer any right on the selected candidate to claim the status of a regular employee of HAL. The engagement is for an initial period of 2 years, extendable by another 2 years subject to performance and hospital requirements.
